command:
cd /Users/d-v-b/dev/zarr-python/packages/zarr-metadata
# clear any pyright cache and re-run clean
rm -rf .pyright_cache ~/.cache/pyright 2>/dev/null
echo "=== fresh pyright src ==="
uvx pyright src 2>&1 | tail -5
echo
echo "=== which file(s) actually error? ==="
uvx pyright src 2>&1 | grep -E "\.py:[0-9]" | sed 's|.*/src/||' | head
